sentences.target: Ich habe morgen einen Termin beim Arzt.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn baɪ̯m aːɐ̯t͡st/

translations.de: Ich habe morgen einen Termin beim Arzt.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈmɔʁɡn̩ ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn baɪ̯m aːɐ̯t͡st/
translations.en: I have a doctor’s appointment tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana tengo cita con el médico.
translations.fr: J’ai un rendez-vous chez le médecin demain.
translations.it: Domani ho un appuntamento dal medico.
translations.yue: 我聽日有個睇醫生嘅預約。
translations.ru: Завтра у меня запись к врачу.
translations.vi: Ngày mai tôi có hẹn với bác sĩ.
translations.nl: Morgen heb ik een afspraak bij de dokter.
translations.uk: Завтра в мене запис до лікаря.
translations.hi: कल मेरा डॉक्टर के साथ अपॉइंटमेंट है.
translations.el: Αύριο έχω ραντεβού με τον γιατρό.
translations.nb: Jeg har time hos legen i morgen.
translations.id: Besok saya punya janji dengan dokter.
translations.sv: Jag har en läkartid i morgon.
translations.ro: Mâine am o programare la doctor.
translations.da: Jeg har en lægetid i morgen.
translations.ja: 明日、病院の予約があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present, 1st person singular; selects a direct object ('einen Termin').
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause to indicate time.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Termin' (direct object).
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'habe'.
Preposition (contraction of 'bei' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces location phrase 'beim Arzt'.
Common noun; masculine; dative singular as complement of 'beim'.

sentences.target: Der Termin ist um neun Uhr.

translations.de: Der Termin ist um neun Uhr.
translations.en: The appointment is at nine o’clock.
translations.es: La cita es a las nueve.
translations.fr: Le rendez-vous est à neuf heures.
translations.vi: Cuộc hẹn vào lúc chín giờ.
translations.nl: De afspraak is om negen uur.

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of 'Termin'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary; 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicative PP 'um neun Uhr'.
Preposition; governs accusative; introduces a time expression.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'Uhr' within the PP.
Common noun; accusative singular; complement of 'um' indicating time of day.

sentences.target: Wir haben gleich einen Termin im Büro.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ɡlaɪ̯ç ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn ɪm byˈʁoː/

translations.de: Wir haben gleich einen Termin im Büro.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən ɡlaɪ̯ç ˈaɪ̯nən tɛʁˈmiːn ɪm byˈʁoː/
translations.en: We have an appointment soon at the office.
translations.es: Pronto tenemos una reunión en la oficina.
translations.fr: Nous avons bientôt une réunion au bureau.
translations.it: Tra poco abbiamo una riunione in ufficio.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们等会儿在办公室有个会议。
translations.yue: 我哋陣間喺辦公室有個會。
translations.ru: Скоро у нас встреча в офисе.
translations.pt: Em breve temos uma reunião no escritório.
translations.he: עוד מעט יש לנו פגישה במשרד.
translations.tr: Az sonra ofiste bir toplantımız var.
translations.vi: Chúng ta sắp có cuộc họp ở văn phòng.
translations.nl: We hebben straks een vergadering op kantoor.
translations.uk: Незабаром у нас зустріч в офісі.
translations.hi: जल्द ही दफ़्तर में हमारी मीटिंग है.
translations.el: Έχουμε σύντομα μια συνάντηση στο γραφείο.
translations.nb: Snart har vi et møte på kontoret.
translations.id: Sebentar lagi kita ada rapat di kantor.
translations.sv: Snart har vi ett möte på kontoret.
translations.ro: În curând avem o întâlnire la birou.
translations.cs: Za chvíli máme schůzku v kanceláři.
translations.da: Snart har vi et møde på kontoret.
translations.ja: もうすぐオフィスで会議があります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun; 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb; present, 1st person plural; takes 'einen Termin' as direct object.
Temporal adverb; indicates immediacy; modifies the clause.
Indefinite article; accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Termin'.
Common noun; masculine; accusative singular; direct object of 'haben'.
Preposition (contraction of 'in' + 'dem'); governs dative; introduces location PP 'im Büro'.
Common noun; neuter; dative singular; complement of 'im'.

translations.en: The appointment doesn’t work for me.
translations.es: La cita no me viene bien.
translations.fr: Le rendez-vous ne me convient pas.
translations.pt: Esse horário não serve para mim.
translations.vi: Lịch hẹn này không phù hợp với tôi.
translations.hu: Ez az időpont nem jó nekem.
translations.hi: यह अपॉइंटमेंट मेरे लिए ठीक नहीं है.
translations.el: Αυτό το ραντεβού δεν μου ταιριάζει.
translations.nb: Denne timen passer ikke for meg.
translations.id: Janji temu ini tidak cocok untuk saya.
translations.sv: Den här tiden passar mig inte.
translations.ro: Această programare nu mi se potrivește.
translations.ja: この時間は都合が悪いです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular; determiner of subject 'Termin'.
Common noun; masculine; nominative singular; subject.
Finite main verb; 3rd person singular present; takes a dative experiencer ('mir').
Personal pronoun; 1st person singular dative; indirect argument of 'passen' ('suits me').
Negation particle; scopes over the verb to negate the clause.
